Brand System · Version 1.3

TailCache

A crystalline identity for a personal digital asset manager built around organization, ownership, resilient storage, and smooth data flow.

FoundationLogoVariants ColorTypographyProduct UIUsage
01 · Foundation

Collected, protected, and always within reach.

The TailCache identity combines a curled tail silhouette with faceted crystal shards. The curl communicates containment and continuity; the facets represent files, versions, metadata, licensing, and backups assembled into one coherent library.

Curled

A circular motion suggests caching, returning, continuity, and assets remaining within reach.

Crystalline

Individual shards represent multiple asset types and versions organized into one system.

Fluid

The violet-to-cyan progression suggests movement across local, hosted, and backup storage.

02 · Primary Logo

The crystal-tail mark

Use the standalone mark for app icons, favicons, avatars, loading states, and compact navigation. Pair it with the TailCache wordmark for marketing, onboarding, and documentation.

Clear space

Maintain clear space equal to one quarter of the mark’s width on every side.

Minimum size

Use the full-color mark at no less than 32 px digitally or 9 mm in print. Below that size, use a simplified monochrome version.

03 · Logo Variations

Full-color and monochrome versions

Use full color whenever the logo has sufficient size and contrast. Use monochrome artwork for embossing, engraving, single-color printing, constrained UI, and very small placements.

Full color

Primary brand expression.

White

For dark or photographic backgrounds.

Gray

For subdued or secondary placements.

Black

For light, monochrome reproduction.

Download full color Download white Download gray Download black
04 · Color

Prismatic core palette

Violet is the primary recognition color. Blue and cyan support storage, synchronization, progress, and connectivity. Neutral surfaces should dominate the application interface.

Tail Violet#7E3FF2
Facet Magenta#A855F7
Cache Indigo#6366F1
Sync Blue#3B82F6
Signal Cyan#0EA5E9
05 · Typography

Technical, friendly, and direct

Display · Space Grotesk Semibold
Your assets.
Always cached.
Interface and body · Inter Regular / Medium

Use Inter for navigation, controls, tables, metadata, settings, and documentation. Prefer sentence case, concise labels, and comfortable spacing.

Code and identifiers · JetBrains Mono

asset_01JTAILCACHE8A · sha256 · v2.4.1

06 · Product UI

Dark by default, content first

The application should prioritize asset previews and operational status. Brand gradients are accents, not structural backgrounds.

TailCache

Spacing

Use an 8 px base grid. Favor 16, 24, and 32 px intervals for components and sections.

Radius

Use 10–14 px for controls and cards, 18–24 px for large containers and promotional surfaces.

Motion

Keep transitions between 140–220 ms. Use directional movement to reinforce uploads, sync, and version changes.

07 · Usage Rules

Protect recognition and consistency

Do

  • Use the mark on calm, high-contrast surfaces.
  • Preserve its proportions, curl, and shard orientation.
  • Use the full gradient for primary brand moments.
  • Use a monochrome version when production requires one color.

Do not

  • Stretch, skew, rotate, or redraw individual shards.
  • Make the mark resemble an animal head, wing, feather, or flame.
  • Place it over busy imagery without a containing surface.
  • Use the white logo on light backgrounds or the black logo on dark backgrounds.
TailCache Brand Guidelines · Crystal Tail Concept · Version 1.3
